name: maze of ducts. I'm totally confused
description: I'm in a maze of ducts. I'm totally confused
hints: Duct maze trap room. Almost every direction leads to the same place.
N/S/E/W/D all lead to room 26. Only UP goes somewhere different (room 31).
All horizontal exits + DOWN→room 26. UP→room 31. This is a convergence trap in the maze.
notes: Duct maze trap node. N/S/E/W/D all→26. U→31. Convergence point that funnels you back to room 26.
